ideas.intro: Ideas for projects, activities, books, games, and more for students with a high level of interest.

items.content:
[ ] Use extra time on this term's projects. 
[ ] [In this video](https://youtu.be/edKFn75UXJ8?si=muUlH_Wei_tPCoe-), Mr. Surridge visits the British Museum to teach Art History students about the Standard of Ur from ancient Mesopotamia. 
[ ] [Take a close look](https://www.britishmuseum.org/blog/depicting-dead-ancient-egyptian-mummy-portraits) at Egyptian mummy portraits in the British Museum with this scientist.

[ ] Use extra time on this term's projects. 
[ ] Learn more about the geometry of Islamic designs [in this video](https://youtu.be/pg1NpMmPv48?si=JshG6Yg_Jg8FAnEb). 
[ ] [Explore the history](https://www.vam.ac.uk/shop) of stained glass with the Victoria & Albert Museum.

[ ] Use extra time on this term's projects. 
[ ] Take a [10 minute tour](https://youtu.be/5MAFWDwo5_U?si=uVhGX3Ec2BUnGs2X) of the Sistine Chapel. (A teacher should preview.) 
[ ] Look forward [in this article](https://time.com/7282582/ai-art-dahlia-dreszer-interview/) on how one artist is embracing AI to create her art.

resources.title: Gardner's Art Through the Ages
resources.author: Fred S. Kleiner, Christin J. Mamiya

resources.title: Of Arms and Artists: The American Revolution through Painters' Eyes
resources.author: Paul Staiti
